message:
🎉 Lovely Beats is now officially released!

✨ New Features:
• Beautiful Material 3 UI
• Unlimited Music Streaming
• Unlimited In-App Downloads
• Live Lyrics & Translation
• Equalizer & Background Playback
• Sleep Timer
• Performance Improvements
• Bug Fixes & Stability Enhancements

💡 Recommended: Activate a YouTube Weekly/Monthly Mobile Package for the best music experience.

❤️ Thank you for supporting Lovely Beats!

popup.title: 🎵 Welcome to Lovely Beats
popup.description: Join our official WhatsApp Channel to receive updates, new features, and announcements. Need help? Contact Support anytime.
